description: CompositionBlack and green plaid check shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full button placket, curved hemline and pocket on left chest with a denim buttonFitSlimWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This black and green plaid check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The black and green combo gives off a youthful vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size 40Height-6', Shoulders-18"
